TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Trần_Đại_Quang, title = Trần_Đại_Quang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trần_Đại_Quang} }

S.FORM: = Trần Đại Quang = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 10 jiyax 12 ka Trần Đại Quang ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Vietnam ta sayang o kiya ka Trần Đại Quang, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tɾ*n **i quaŋ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka tɾ*n **i quaŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *iətnam ta sajaŋ o kija ka tɾ*n **i quaŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Trần Đại Quang = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 10 jiyax 12 ka Trần Đại Quang ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Vietnam ta sayang o kiya ka Trần Đại Quang, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tɾ*n **i quaŋ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka tɾ*n **i quaŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *iətnam ta sajaŋ o kija ka tɾ*n **i quaŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
